Description: Composite Performance Deviation Index over 3 quarters, aggregating all PDI3 factors using risk parity weighting to reflect overall abnormal absolute deviation across core fundamentals

Composite quality-adjusted performance deviation index over 3 trailing quarters, aggregating standardized deviations of multiple financial ratios (QPDI3 factors) across clusters using risk parity weighting
Composite PDI score aggregated from raw four-quarter PDI factors using risk parity weighting, showing a holistic measure of absolute fundamental deviation

Composite quality PDI score over 4 trailing quarters, aggregating all quality-adjusted PDI factors by clustering similar metrics, equal-weighting within clusters and risk parity weighting across clusters, to summarize deviations in quality ratios
Composite PDI score aggregating all PDI factors over 5 trailing quarters using risk parity weighting; summarizes absolute magnitude of fundamental deviations in accounting variables
